name: Sony aibo
short_description: A robotic dog companion with expressive movement, cameras, and adaptive behavior.
long_description: An animal-form companion robot that uses doglike behavior, cameras, and onboard learning to form an attachment relationship rather than perform tasks. Originally launched in 1999 and revived in 2018, aibo is a touchstone for creature-form social robotics.

images.caption: Sony aibo (ERS-1000).
images.alt_text: A white Sony aibo robotic dog sitting upright, viewed from the front against a plain background.

sources.title: aibo
sources.access_notes: Official product page; original launch 1999, revived 2018.
